name: 1b-fix-lint
command: pnpm --filter oando-site exec eslint features/planner/admin/svg-editor/svgPipelineRunner.ts features/planner/open3d/catalog/svg/svgCompiler.server.ts features/planner/open3d/catalog/svg/svgServerSanitizer.ts --format compact 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'error|warning|svgPipelineRunner|svgCompiler' ; echo 'LINT_DONE_FOR_TOUCHED'
